name: What's the time limit to claim chemical exposure from work in Utah?
description: 1 year from injury knowledge in Utah; up to 6 years for occupational diseases[4].

mainEntity.name: What's the time limit to claim chemical exposure from work in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1 year from injury knowledge in Utah; up to 6 years for occupational diseases[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah requires workers' comp claims within 1 year of injury knowledge or 3 years of accident; 6 years for occupational diseases like cancer.** Chemical exposures often qualify as occupational if linked to work[4]. Deadlines start from symptom awareness[2]. **Key factors:** Prompt reporting preserves evidence like air samples[2]; delayed symptoms extend but don't ignore limits. **Practical guidance:** File even if unsure; consult attorney to calculate your deadline. Document everything now. **Missing deadlines bars claims permanently.**
